creator: squat@squat.no
text:
Sorry, forgot to bump version number (revision number to be precise. Next version will be 1.1 or 1.0.1, thirteen RCs are to many).

diff -ruN /usr/ports/net/miniupnpd/Makefile miniupnpd/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/net/miniupnpd/Makefile	2008-01-12 14:10:53.000000000 +0100
+++ miniupnpd/Makefile	2008-01-29 15:37:19.000000000 +0100
@@ -7,11 +7,10 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	miniupnpd
 PORTVERSION=	1.0
-PORTREVISION=	13
+PORTREVISION=	14
 CATEGORIES=	net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://miniupnp.tuxfamily.org/files/ \
 		http://miniupnp.free.fr/files/
-DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-1.0-RC13
 
 MAINTAINER=	squat@squat.no
 COMMENT=	A UPnP IGD implementation which uses pf/ipf
diff -ruN /usr/ports/net/miniupnpd/distinfo miniupnpd/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/net/miniupnpd/distinfo	2008-01-12 14:10:53.000000000 +0100
+++ miniupnpd/distinfo	2008-01-28 09:58:19.000000000 +0100
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (miniupnpd-1.0-RC13.tar.gz) = e1348e03e129ab96c9ecf7b30a2e8a2e
-SHA256 (miniupnpd-1.0-RC13.tar.gz) = a3087923ca992645fb5cd9a198b36fa3cbf98645f2421636eab7f057ddd75199
-SIZE (miniupnpd-1.0-RC13.tar.gz) = 67892
+MD5 (miniupnpd-1.0.tar.gz) = 9d500aa930e31fd49250c143df0abb4c
+SHA256 (miniupnpd-1.0.tar.gz) = ff0424986d788207e113a06cf954785fe5fc74f91ee8b6b2bc883fcc180cd5ba
+SIZE (miniupnpd-1.0.tar.gz) = 69427
